calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-14-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Upon Default; Declaration In Support Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-27-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Newton Chiu.
Dept. 514. Judge: Eric R. Fleming. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

John E. Cowan, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Heath-Newton LLP.
Mr. Cowen was placed under oath and testified as a Principal for plaintiff Heath-Newton LLP.
No appearance by defendant Newton Chiu.
Plaintiff's complaint for breach of contract was filed on February 27, 2018 and served via substitute service on defendant Newton Chiu on March 11, 2018.
Default was entered against defendant on April 24, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on May 21, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Heath-Newton LLP, and against the Defaulted Defendant Newton Chiu, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $82,613.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $23,765.00.
Costs - $510.00.

Total - $106,888.00.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
